config.pressEnter: Press Enter to keep the current value
config.apiKeyHint: [CONFIG] The API key can be obtained at https://misaka.com.br
config.boolInvalid: Answer with y/yes for yes, n for no, or Enter to keep.

logs.ownerLidFailed: Could not get the owner LID.
logs.commandIgnoredNoLid: Ignored because LID could not be resolved: {{sender}}
logs.botStarted: {{botName}} started and ready to receive messages.

errors.ownerOnly: вқҢ This command is only for the bot owner.
errors.groupOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in groups.
errors.privateOnly: вқҢ This command can only be used in private chats.
errors.adminOnly: вқҢ This command is only for group administrators.
errors.botAdminRequired: вқҢ I need to be a group administrator to execute this command.
errors.commandBlocked: вқҢ This command has been blocked by the bot owner.
errors.commandExecution: вқҢ An error occurred while executing the command.

errors.missingKey: API key not configured. Configure it in src/config.json
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later

connection.sessionCleared: Local session removed. Start again to generate a new QR.
connection.qrScan: Scan with WhatsApp to connect this session.
connection.pairingInstruction: Enter in WhatsApp: Linked devices > Link a device > Link with phone number.
connection.pairingExpired: Pairing code expired. Requesting new code...

loggedOut.title: Session disconnected
loggedOut.description: WhatsApp ended this session or it was removed from connected devices.
loggedOut.action: I will clear the local session. Start again to generate a new QR.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: WhatsApp rejected the connection for this session.
forbidden.action: Check your credentials, wait a few minutes and generate a new session if it keeps failing.

connectionLost.title: Connection lost or timed out
connectionLost.description: The network dropped, fluctuated or the attempt took too long to respond.
connectionLost.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

multideviceMismatch.title: Multi-device mismatch
multideviceMismatch.description: The session does not match the multi-device protocol expected by WhatsApp.
multideviceMismatch.action: Update Baileys/dependencies and generate a new session if necessary.

connectionClosed.title: Connection closed
connectionClosed.description: The connection was closed by WhatsApp or the network.
connectionClosed.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

connectionReplaced.title: Connection replaced
connectionReplaced.description: Another instance connected using the same session.
connectionReplaced.action: Close the other instance before starting this one again.

badSession.title: Invalid session
badSession.description: The authentication files appear to be corrupted or invalid.
badSession.action: Delete {{authPath}} and scan a new QR code.

unavailableService.title: Service unavailable
unavailableService.description: WhatsApp or the connection route is temporarily unavailable.
unavailableService.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

restartRequired.title: Restart required
restartRequired.description: The server requested that the client be restarted.
restartRequired.action: I will restart the connection automatically.

default.title: Connection closed
default.description: The connection was closed for an unmapped reason.
default.action: I will try to reconnect automatically.

update.failed: Update failed. Continuing with current version.

sticker.usage:
в•ӯв”ҖгҖҢ *STICKER* гҖҚ
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вңҰ How to use:
в”Ӯ   send or reply to a photo with:
в”Ӯ   s
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   send or reply to a video with:
в”Ӯ   sticker
в”Ӯ
в•°в”Җ Result: square sticker

в”Ӯ
